values.description: Hosted Supabase project URL. Dashboard → Project Settings → Data API → Project URL. Format: https://<ref>.supabase.co (no trailing slash, no /rest/v1).
Publishable key (a.k.a. anon key in older dashboards). Dashboard → Project Settings → API keys → 'publishable' or 'anon public'. Safe to use in clients; respects RLS.
Password for the auth user above. Used by 'Auth → Sign in with password' to mint a user JWT for RLS-protected queries.
Auto-populated by the 'Sign in with password' request — leave blank.
Auto-populated by the 'Sign in with password' request — leave blank.
UUID of a company row. Run 'companies → List' first, copy an id, paste here to drive per-company queries.
UUID of a filing_summaries row. Run 'filing_summaries → By company_id' first, copy an id, paste here to drive the review-pipeline Edge Function calls and filing_sections queries.
